meta.homeDescription: Open-source AI-native development infrastructure built with Rust: OpenPR, PRX, prx-memory, and wacli.
meta.openprDescription: Open-source project management with built-in governance.
meta.prxDescription: Self-evolving AI assistant framework in Rust.
meta.memoryDescription: Local-first MCP memory for coding agents.
meta.prxSdDescription: Open-source antivirus engine with multi-layered threat detection.
meta.prxWafDescription: High-performance Web Application Firewall built on Pingora.
meta.fenfaDescription: Self-hosted app distribution platform for all platforms.

hero.title: AI-native development infrastructure
hero.subtitle: Open source. Built with Rust.
hero.description: OpenPRX builds governed tooling for teams and coding agents across project management, AI orchestration, and long-term memory.

products.title: Products
products.description: A focused toolkit for operational AI-native development.

items.name: OpenPR
items.tagline: Open-source project management with built-in governance
items.description: Team work management with issues, boards, sprints, and governance workflows.

items.name: PRX
items.description: Rust-native assistant runtime with multi-provider inference and governed sub-agents.
items.tech: Rust core, MCP client, multi-provider runtime

items.name: prx-memory
items.tagline: Local-first MCP memory for coding agents
items.description: Durable memory toolchain for storing, recalling, and governing agent knowledge.

items.name: PRX-SD
items.description: Multi-layered threat detection with hash matching, YARA rules, and heuristic analysis.

items.name: PRX-WAF
items.description: Built on Cloudflare Pingora with OWASP CRS, GeoIP, bot detection, and 644+ rules.

items.name: Fenfa
items.description: Deploy once, distribute to iOS, Android, macOS, Windows, and Linux.

items.title: Governed by Design
items.description: Every workflow includes trust scoring, review gates, and policy controls. Not bolted on, built in.

items.title: Rust-Native Performance
items.description: Sub-millisecond latency. Zero-copy where possible. Production reliability from day one.

items.title: AI-First Architecture
items.description: MCP protocol native. 34 tools. 14 providers. Agents are first-class citizens in the system architecture.

fit.title: How It Fits Together
fit.description: OpenPRX products compose as one operating loop for modern teams and coding agents.

getInvolved.title: Get Involved
getInvolved.description: OpenPRX is open source and actively developed in public.

openpr.name: OpenPR
openpr.tagline: Open-source project management with built-in governance
openpr.description: A complete project collaboration platform for modern engineering teams.

features.title: Issues & Boards
features.description: Full issue tracking with Kanban boards and sprint planning.

features.title: Governance Center
features.description: Proposals, voting, trust scores, decision records, veto, and escalation.

features.title: AI Integration
features.description: Bot tokens, AI agents, AI tasks, AI review, and webhook callbacks.

features.title: MCP Server
features.description: 34 tools across HTTP, stdio, and SSE protocols.

features.title: File Attachments
features.description: Upload and attach files to issues and comments.

features.title: Bot Token Auth
features.description: Secure API access for automated agents and integrations.

prx.name: PRX
prx.description: An extensible Rust framework for production-grade AI assistants.

features.title: 14 AI Providers
features.description: Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Ollama, OpenRouter, Bedrock, GitHub Copilot, GLM, LiteLLM, vLLM, HuggingFace, and more.

features.title: 19 Channels
features.description: Signal, WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Slack, IRC, and 13 more channels.

features.title: Self-Evolution
features.description: Autonomous optimization system (~9,500 lines) with measurable acceptance criteria.

features.title: Governed Sub-Agents
features.description: Concurrency limits, depth controls, config inheritance, and policy enforcement.

features.title: OAuth Auto-Refresh
features.description: Automatic token refresh for Anthropic, GitHub Copilot, and compatible providers.

features.title: Production Hardened
features.description: 3-phase security, rate limiting, policy checks, compaction, and timeout controls.

architecture.channelsList: Signal, Telegram, Slack, Discord, WhatsApp, IRC...

prx-memory.name: prx-memory
prx-memory.tagline: Local-first MCP memory for coding agents
prx-memory.description: A memory runtime that keeps agent context durable, queryable, and governed.

features.title: Dual Transport
features.description: stdio for local CLI integration, HTTP for networked access.

features.title: Full Toolchain
features.description: store, recall, update, forget, export, import, migrate, reembed, and compact.

features.title: Governance Controls
features.description: Structured format, tag normalization, ratio bounds, and periodic maintenance.

features.title: Evolution Support
features.description: memory_evolve with train+holdout acceptance and constraint gating.

features.title: Hybrid Retrieval
features.description: Lexical + vector recall with optional reranking via Jina, Cohere, and Pinecone.

features.title: Universal Compatibility
features.description: Works with Codex, Claude Code, OpenClaw, and any MCP client.

prx-sd.name: PRX-SD
prx-sd.description: Multi-layered threat detection engine for files and directories.

features.title: Hash Signature Matching
features.description: O(1) LMDB lookup against millions of SHA-256/MD5 hashes from MalwareBazaar, URLhaus, VirusShare, and more.

features.title: YARA Rule Engine
features.description: 64+ built-in rules plus community rulesets from Neo23x0, Yara-Rules, ReversingLabs, ESET, and InQuest.

features.title: Heuristic Analysis
features.description: PE/ELF/MachO-aware entropy, suspicious API, packer detection, and behavioral scoring.

features.title: Real-time Monitoring
features.description: Watch directories for new or modified files with automatic scanning.

features.title: Quarantine System
features.description: Isolate, list, and restore detected threats with a built-in quarantine vault.

features.title: Cross-Platform
features.description: Native support for Linux, macOS, and Windows with platform-specific detections.

prx-waf.name: PRX-WAF
prx-waf.description: Production-grade WAF built on Cloudflare's Pingora proxy framework.

features.title: 16-Phase Request Pipeline
features.description: Full request lifecycle processing from connection to logging, with early exit on block.

features.title: 644+ Built-in Rules
features.description: OWASP CRS, custom YAML rules, ModSecurity compatibility, and JSON rule format.

features.title: GeoIP with ip2region
features.description: Country and region-level blocking and rate limiting with offline ip2region database.

features.title: Bot Detection
features.description: User-agent analysis, behavioral scoring, and crawler classification.

features.title: Advanced Rate Limiting
features.description: Per-IP, per-route, and per-API-key rate limiting with sliding window counters.

features.title: API Security
features.description: JSON body inspection, parameter validation, and API-specific rule profiles.

architecture.phases: OWASP CRS | GeoIP | Bot | Rate Limit | API

fenfa.name: Fenfa
fenfa.description: Open-source alternative to Pgyer and TestFlight for distributing apps across all platforms.

features.title: Universal Upload
features.description: Upload IPA, APK, DMG, EXE, and Linux packages with automatic metadata extraction.

features.title: 5-Platform Support
features.description: iOS, Android, macOS, Windows, and Linux with platform-specific install pages.

features.title: OTA Distribution
features.description: iOS OTA install via manifest.plist, Android direct APK, desktop download pages.

features.title: Version Management
features.description: Track versions, changelogs, and build numbers across all platforms.

features.title: Access Control
features.description: Password-protected downloads and short-link sharing for teams.

features.title: REST API
features.description: Full API for CI/CD integration, automated uploads, and version queries.

architecture.distributionDesc: iOS OTA · Android APK · Desktop Download

quickStart: git clone https://github.com/openprx/fenfa.git && cd fenfa && make build
